content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

No in-scope findings. HEAD matches the specified fork point, and the only worktree changes are ignored live orchestration files under .ralph-burning/projects/rb-lite/. I also checked the current Bash implementation and smoke tests directly (`bash -n bin/rb-lite && bash tests/smoke.sh` passed); `make test` could not be run because `make` is not installed in this environment.

## Amendments

None.
